company.name: AutoStream
company.tagline: Automated video editing tools for content creators
company.description: AutoStream is a SaaS platform that uses AI to automate video editing workflows for YouTubers, Instagram creators, TikTokers, and other content creators. Our tools save hours of editing time while delivering professional-quality results.

policies.details: No refunds are issued after 7 days from the date of purchase. Refund requests within the first 7 days will be honored with no questions asked.
24/7 live support is available exclusively for Pro plan subscribers. Basic plan users have access to email support with a 1-2 business day response time.
You can cancel your subscription at any time. Your access continues until the end of the billing period.
New users can start a 7-day free trial on any plan. No credit card required to start the trial.

faqs.question: What video formats are supported?
faqs.answer: AutoStream supports MP4, MOV, AVI, MKV, and WebM as input formats. Output is delivered in MP4 (H.264/H.265) for maximum compatibility.

faqs.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, you can change your plan at any time. Upgrades take effect immediately; downgrades apply at the next billing cycle.

faqs.question: Is there a limit on video length?
faqs.answer: Basic plan supports videos up to 30 minutes. Pro plan supports videos up to 4 hours in length.

faqs.question: Does AutoStream work for YouTube Shorts and Reels?
faqs.answer: Yes! AutoStream has dedicated templates and aspect ratio tools for YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and TikTok vertical formats.
